data.description:
## Why
Incident 2731's trigger commit (10837ca88) shipped the code_review artifact feature, but it is inert in prod: the box's .env has no REVIEWBOT_TICKETS_* vars (entrypoint defers the tickets clone; voter emit is best-effort and warns per review). autodeploy rsync-excludes .env and never re-runs fetch-secrets.sh, so NO future env key can reach the box without a boot — a second half-updated-deploy-path defect.
## What
- Apply terraform (ssm.tf slot /rebar/prod/reviewbot-tickets-pat), populate the PAT, re-run fetch-secrets.sh, restart bot; verify artifact emission works against the (now hand-created) gerrit_reviewbot_tickets volume.
- Design fix for env delivery on deploy (e.g. autodeploy re-runs fetch-secrets before compose up).
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] code_review artifacts are written + pushed from prod reviews (no 'emission failed' warnings).
- [ ] New env keys reach the box on deploy without a manual boot.
- [ ] File paths: infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh, infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh, infra/terraform/ssm.tf.
data.title: activate the reviewbot durable-tickets feature: SSM PAT + terraform apply + fetch-secrets rerun; fix .env delivery gap in autodeploy
